title: Improved usability and performance of the groups list
description: We made improvements to the organization’s groups list so it’s easier to use. This change applies to customers who have the centralized user management experience. Use the Apps filter to find groups that grant roles to a specific app. Add users or grant access to a group in the actions column, without navigating to the group profile. Choose how many groups to show per page, so you can browse your groups list more efficiently. You can also sort groups by their name with this update. We also updat
